items.title: Zašto ne možete spavati bez pokrivača, čak ni kad je vruće
items.summary: POTREBA da spavamo pod pokrivačem čak i po vrućini rezultat je načina na koji tijelo regulira temperaturu i traži osjećaj sigurnosti.

items.title: Ancient DNA reveals plague was already killing humans 5,500 years ago
items.summary: Plague was already a deadly killer 5,500 years ago, long before cities, farming, or the rat-infested conditions usually linked to historic outbreaks.
